name: pattern_motif
description: ONE simple flat silhouette of a round yarn ball with a short trailing thread, single solid color, clean closed shape suitable as a tiny repeating background motif. No gradients, no texture, no outline.
prompt_extra: single flat shape, one solid color (white), no gradient, no outline, no shading — pure silhouette

variants.name: warm
variants.prompt_extra: slightly warmer, cozier tones and a touch more craft detail

variants.name: clean
variants.prompt_extra: slightly simpler, more minimal composition with bolder shapes
